title: PULPA
lead: Frutero Club's reputation token: your score, your currency, and your connections inside the community. This is where we're headed.

what.heading: What it is
what.body: Every bounty you complete and every contribution to the community builds your $PULPA. It's yours and verifiable — the key to climb tiers and unlock real opportunities.

now.title: Build your profile and complete your first bounties
now.body: $PULPA is visible as the club's direction. Live scoring isn't switched on yet — for now, completing bounties fills your profile and sets you up for the first distribution.

q3.title: First distribution — Q3 2026 Membership
q3.body: The first $PULPA is distributed with Frutero Club's Quarterly Membership for Jul-Aug-Sep 2026. Complete the welcome bounties to get in.

next.title: $PULPA goes live
next.body: Real-time scoring, the leaderboard, and rewards switch on. Your $PULPA starts to count and open doors.
